title: Symptoms of Covid-19
content: Possible symptoms of Covid-19 include fever, cough, shortness of breath, fatigue, body aches, loss of taste or smell, sore throat, and congestion.

title: Covid-19 Treatment and Prevention
content: If you have Covid-19 and are at a higher risk for severe illness, talk to your healthcare provider as soon as possible. Getting vaccinated is the first and most important step to prevent severe health outcomes.
